ranked_next_axis_hypotheses.axis: A genuinely new validation-label-free base model family trained from scratch
ranked_next_axis_hypotheses.why_not_launched_now: Implemented candidates in the repo are already weak/closed; starting a new family would exceed a bounded single iteration and likely produce only underpowered one-split evidence.
Existing disagreement surfaces overlap jackknife, frontier/capacity, layer-mixture, or rankblend families and do not avoid quarantine/near-duplicate risk.
